channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Oak trees are delaying spring to starve caterpillars
item.description: Oak trees have a surprising trick to fight back against hungry caterpillars: they simply wait. When trees are heavily attacked one year, they delay le...

item.title: AI lets chemists design molecules by simply describing them
item.description: Creating complex molecules usually requires years of experience and countless decisions, but a new AI system is changing that. Synthegy lets chemists ...

item.title: 240-million-year-old giant “sand creeper” found hidden in retaining wall
item.description: A forgotten fossil hidden inside a garden wall has turned out to be one of Australia’s most remarkable prehistoric discoveries. Scientists have now id...

item.title: Webb space telescope reveals a scorching “super-Earth” that looks like Mercury
item.description: A scorching, airless world just 48 light-years away is offering scientists a rare glimpse into the geology of distant planets. Using the James Webb Sp...
